title: Inventory Production Admin
description:
Basic information:

  • Salary UP $2,500
  • 5 days: 7.45am to 5.30pm
  • Location: Kranji
  • MNC (Career progression)

Job scope:

  • Prepare, update, and maintain production documents such as job/work orders, checklists, reports, and daily output logs.
  • Enter and maintain accurate production data in MRP or internal systems, ensuring proper filing of all records.
  • Assist in preparing and updating daily or weekly production schedules, and follow up on production progress.
  • Coordinate job orders and production activities with production supervisors, warehouse, QC/QA, purchasing, and planning teams.
  • Track raw material usage and finished goods inventory; update stock records and coordinate material requests and replenishment with the warehouse.
  • Communicate production updates, delays, or issues to relevant departments.
  • Prepare production-related reports, including daily production summaries, downtime reports, and manpower attendance.
  • Provide administrative support for audits, meetings, safety reviews, and general office tasks (filing, printing, scheduling).
  • Support continuous improvement initiatives and 5S activities.

For interested candidates, please submit your updated resume by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON

By submitting your personal data and/or resume to us in connection with your job application, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us in collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal data and/or resume to prospective employers for the purpose of the evaluating, processing and administration by company relating to this job application.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified
We wish you all the best in your career search.

Zen Career Pte Ltd | 24C2559
Tong Xi Yao (Xavier)| R25158887

Our mission is to empower both employers and job seekers. By fostering meaningful connections, we aim to drive success and growth for all parties involved.

With a passionate team and a commitment to excellence, Zen Career Pte Ltd is your trusted partner in navigating the world of work. We believe in the power of people and are devoted to making a positive impact through our tailored staffing services.
